response:
I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented professional with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, possessing a strong knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I excel in interpersonal communication, team leadership, and continuous learning. I am reliable, productive, and eager to take on new responsibilities.  

I have experience as a medical scribe and editor, working with platforms like eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office. I maintain high accuracy and meet strict turnaround times. I have also served as a supervisor and customer relationship executive, ensuring quality and efficiency in glass production. My role has included quality analysis, performance evaluation, and process improvement in medical transcription.  

I am passionate about my work and committed to delivering exceptional service. I am adaptable, computer-savvy, and a team leader who thrives in dynamic environments. My skills include proficiency in Word, Excel, Outlook, and electronic health records. I am a positive, energetic, and proactive individual with a strong drive to contribute to organizational success.  

I am an Indian national with an On Visit Visa and am eager to contribute to a professional and supportive work environment.
